description: Desired-state artifact for a training run actively managed by the reconciler daemon (kikai serve). One file per active run under managed_runs/<run_id>.yaml. The daemon owns a sibling managed_runs/<run_id>.progress.json for idempotent ticks.

delivery_target_id.description: delivery_targets/<id> used for daemon-sent lifecycle notifications (start/done/fail).

experiment_id.description: Experiment whose checkpoint_retention block supplies keep_latest/keep_best when 'retention' is omitted.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle policy; currently 'until_early_stop' (finalize + teardown on terminal metrics event or container exit).

max_step.description: QC is generated only for checkpoints up to this step; null = no cap.

window_steps_relative.description: window_steps are offsets from the run's FIRST metrics step (probe/resume segments) instead of absolute steps

qc_artifacts_dir.description: Daemon-local directory template ({{step}}/{{step6}}, refs allowed) globbed for QC media to record in the artifact ledger after each successful QC.

qc_op.description: Inline alternative to qc_op_template: a kikai_operation object with the same placeholders.

qc_op_template.description: Path (relative to project_root) to a kikai_operation template run per new checkpoint. Placeholders {{step}}, {{step6}}, {{checkpoint_name}}, {{run_id}} are substituted before execution. If the template is an operation_sequence, its pipeline_run_id MUST embed {{step}}/{{step6}} (each checkpoint writes a one-shot pipeline_runs record that is never overwritten); the daemon rejects a non-step-varying one.

retention.description: Two independent rolling windows. Omit to inherit the experiment's checkpoint_retention block.

keep_milestones.description: trajectory anchors for offline probes: protect periodic checkpoints matching (step-from_step) % every_steps == 0 within [from_step, until_step]

run_dir.description: Daemon-local run directory containing checkpoints/ (env: or ${VAR} refs allowed).

run_id.description: Unique id for this managed run; keys the progress file.

training_container_id.description: Container id (containers/<id>.yaml) whose docker.name is polled for training status.
